# skip list fixture — exercises blanks, comments, whitespace,
# resource-level skips and per-path skips.

apps

# hand-written DevOps services
builds
   customerReviews

# duplicate to verify set semantics
apps

# Per-path skips (resource has sub-paths we DO want generated).
appStoreVersions /v1/appStoreVersions
appStoreVersions /v1/appStoreVersions/{id}
# Prefix glob: skip every path under /relationships/.
appStoreVersions /v1/appStoreVersions/{id}/relationships/*
